title: Git release tags 0.12.0-0.16.0
description: Commit the doc changes on a feature branch and create the missing annotated release tags pointing at the correct commits. Local only — no push.
successCriteria: Doc files committed on branch bober/docs-correction-0.16.0; ONLY the 6 doc files staged (git show --stat shows no unrelated files).
Annotated tag v0.16.0 -> the doc-release commit.
No tags pushed (git ls-remote --tags origin does not list v0.12.0-v0.16.0).
generatorNotes: CRITICAL: the working tree has many unrelated changes. Stage explicitly: git add README.md CHANGELOG.md package.json COMMANDS.md VISION.md docs/providers.md. Create the branch first (git checkout -b bober/docs-correction-0.16.0) since we start on main. Use annotated tags: git tag -a v0.12.0 e30099f -m '...' etc. Tag v0.16.0 at HEAD after committing. Do NOT git push or git push --tags.
evaluatorNotes: Verify git rev-parse v0.12.0^{commit} == e30099f (and the others). Verify git show --stat HEAD lists exactly the 6 doc files. Verify git ls-remote --tags origin does NOT contain the new tags.
